data.body: Epic 8d27 plan-review BLOCKED twice on identity-subtree design detail (T1 critical). Round 1: secret-delivery mechanism unspecified across 3 envs -> added per-env 'Secret delivery mechanism' section. Round 2: my AWS claim wrongly cited the .env KEY=VALUE pattern for a multi-line PEM key -> corrected to the materialize-to-0600-file precedent (ci-gerrit-ssh-key/g2p-github-pat, sshsig -f key_path). Note: all epic blocks are IDENTITY-subtree design nits (deferred half); config-prune stories don't depend on them. Re-running review.
